requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 / Local Connector Standard (Unconfirmed — Verify with AE/IBNORCA)
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 / 本地接口标准（未确认——请向AE/IBNORCA核实）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 / 本地接口標準（未確認——請向AE/IBNORCA核實）

summary.en: Bolivia's applicable connector standard for EV charging has not been confirmed from official published sources as of 2026-06-14. Bolivia's electricity regulatory framework (Ley 1604 / AE) and standards body IBNORCA adopt IEC-derived norms (NB — Normas Bolivianas) where available, suggesting IEC 62196 Type 2 (Mennekes) for AC and CCS2 (IEC 62196-3 configuration FF) for DC are the most likely reference — consistent with Bolivia's 50 Hz grid and IEC alignment. However, Bolivia's geographic proximity to Brazil and Argentina (which use the SAE J1772 / IEC 62196-2 Type 1 combo CCS1 ecosystem) and the limited installed base of EV chargers mean the connector landscape is mixed and unconfirmed. The distinction is critical: Bolivia's 50 Hz supply is incompatible with CCS1/J1772 DC fast charging signaling designed for North American 60 Hz grids; IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is technically more appropriate for a 50 Hz environment. Exporters must verify the applicable connector type with AE and IBNORCA before specifying, manufacturing, or shipping.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，玻利维亚电动汽车充电适用接口标准尚未从官方成文来源得到确认。玻利维亚电力监管框架（第1604号法律 / AE）和标准机构IBNORCA在有NB（玻利维亚国家标准）的情况下采用IEC衍生规范，提示IEC 62196 Type 2（Mennekes）用于交流充电、CCS2（IEC 62196-3 FF配置）用于直流充电最有可能作为参照——与玻利维亚50 Hz电网和IEC体系一致。然而，玻利维亚与巴西和阿根廷地理位置相近（后两者使用SAE J1772 / IEC 62196-2 Type 1联合充电CCS1体系），且当地电动汽车充电桩装机基数有限，导致接口格局混乱且尚未确认。这一区别至关重要：玻利维亚50 Hz供电与为北美60 Hz电网设计的CCS1/J1772直流快充信号不兼容；IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2在技术上更适合50 Hz环境。出口商在规格确认、生产或发货前必须向AE和IBNORCA核实适用接口类型。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，玻利維亞電動汽車充電適用接口標準尚未從官方成文來源得到確認。玻利維亞電力監管框架（第1604號法律 / AE）和標準機構IBNORCA在有NB（玻利維亞國家標準）的情況下採用IEC衍生規範，提示IEC 62196 Type 2（Mennekes）用於交流充電、CCS2（IEC 62196-3 FF配置）用於直流充電最有可能作為參照——與玻利維亞50 Hz電網和IEC體系一致。然而，玻利維亞與巴西和阿根廷地理位置相近（後兩者使用SAE J1772 / IEC 62196-2 Type 1聯合充電CCS1體系），且當地電動汽車充電樁裝機基數有限，導致接口格局混亂且尚未確認。這一區別至關重要：玻利維亞50 Hz供電與為北美60 Hz電網設計的CCS1/J1772直流快充信號不兼容；IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2在技術上更適合50 Hz環境。出口商在規格確認、生產或發貨前必須向AE和IBNORCA核實適用接口類型。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories (Type 2 / Mennekes)
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers (CCS2 configuration FF)
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IBNORCA (Instituto Boliviano de Normalización y Calidad) — NB standard adoptions from IEC
AE (Autoridad de Electricidad) — applicable technical norms for EV charging installations

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a superficially similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses a male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet — opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. These hardware and protocol differences apply regardless of which IEC 62196 variant Bolivia ultimately mandates.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2表面相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。无论玻利维亚最终强制要求哪种IEC 62196变型，上述硬件和协议差异均适用。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2表面相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。無論玻利維亞最終強制要求哪種IEC 62196變型，上述硬體和協議差異均適用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for any IEC 62196 Bolivia deployment. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for DC), labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for a project-compliant connector design. The specific connector standard applicable in Bolivia is unconfirmed — exporters must verify with AE and IBNORCA before specifying or manufacturing. Do not assume CCS1 (J1772-derived) applies: Bolivia's 50 Hz grid makes CCS2 technically more appropriate; the applicable standard must be confirmed from official sources.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于玻利维亚任何IEC 62196部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（对于直流须从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告、温升证据及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。玻利维亚适用的具体接口标准尚未确认——出口商在规格确认或生产前须向AE和IBNORCA核实。请勿假设适用CCS1（J1772衍生）：玻利维亚50 Hz电网使CCS2在技术上更为适用；适用标准须从官方来源确认。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於玻利維亞任何IEC 62196部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（對於直流須從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。玻利維亞適用的具體接口標準尚未確認——出口商在規格確認或生產前須向AE和IBNORCA核實。請勿假設適用CCS1（J1772衍生）：玻利維亞50 Hz電網使CCS2在技術上更為適用；適用標準須從官方來源確認。

mandatory_status.target: Unconfirmed — Bolivia's applicable connector standard must be verified with AE and IBNORCA; IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is the technically indicated standard for a 50 Hz market but has not been confirmed from an official published Bolivian source as of 2026-06-14; physical incompatibility with GB/T connectors requires hardware redesign regardless of which IEC 62196 variant applies
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 substitute

source.publisher: IBNORCA — Instituto Boliviano de Normalización y Calidad

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bolivia's connector standard is unconfirmed — do not assume CCS1 (J1772) or CCS2 without verifying with AE and IBNORCA. Bolivia's 50 Hz grid makes CCS2 / IEC 62196 Type 2 technically more appropriate than CCS1. GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with any IEC 62196 vehicle inlet and require hardware redesign before any Bolivia deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 玻利维亚接口标准尚未确认——在未向AE和IBNORCA核实前，请勿假设适用CCS1（J1772）或CCS2。玻利维亚50 Hz电网使CCS2 / IEC 62196 Type 2在技术上比CCS1更为适用。GB/T接口与任何IEC 62196车辆接口在物理上不兼容，在任何玻利维亚部署前须进行硬件重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 玻利維亞接口標準尚未確認——在未向AE和IBNORCA核實前，請勿假設適用CCS1（J1772）或CCS2。玻利維亞50 Hz電網使CCS2 / IEC 62196 Type 2在技術上比CCS1更為適用。GB/T接口與任何IEC 62196車輛接口在物理上不兼容，在任何玻利維亞部署前須進行硬體重新設計。
